title: Glowing Ores! - Borderless Edition
description: a Resource Pack that shows a glint effect on ores by using .mcmeta, supports Optifine/Continuity to make them fully glow!
body:
# Glowing Ores! - Borderless Edition.

![Borderless Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ecb7ea6759823b21d51a0d3e93cc7b030dadc01_0.webp)

This resource pack was seperated from "Enhanced Visuals" due to some Members wanting the Glowing ores only and not get their other items affected. 

## THE ORES WONT GLOW WITHOUT HAVING ONE OF THESE THINGS INSTALLED!

### Forge
**Optifine** or **Continuity**

### Fabric
**Continuity**

**The Resource pack heavily relies on the Emissive properties used by Optifine/Continuity Client/Mod. Without it the resource pack will work but the glowing will be gone and there will be only a gradient outline.**

<details>
<summary>Mod Supports!</summary>

- Create (more to come soon)
- Mekanism + Dense Mekanism (addon)
- Powah
- Enerziged Power
- Amarite
- Galosphere
- Mythic Metals
- Exp Ores
- Diamond in the Rough
- Vic's Point Blank
- Things
- Ores to the Nether

</details>

This version doesn't feature Borders as it's "Borderless"! Check out the "Borderful Edition" for better spotting!

<details>
<summary>Glowing Ores! - Borderful Edition</summary>

![The Original!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b75e36608ddf9849ba91129bf01c1765846f63_0.webp)

### [Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-ores!)
**Download** the original **"Borderful"** Project for the **Glowing ores** **WITH borders**!

This is the **first Resource Pack** that started all of this!


</details>




# Version 7.0 Release!
As a bigger version the pack has gained new mod supports! Thus being; Amarite, Mythic Metals, Things, etc.

![Mythic MEtals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec3099320c6a63e28741db8ff922d5a2966e4bb4_0.webp)

![Things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1458ca60202fd62ad33a99c04a6b0a04ea3f1088.png)
